name: S-51
events: 13 May 1943 S-51 attacked a German convoy of the Tanafjord, four torpedoes were fired but none found a target. The torpedoes were fired from 20 meters down without a visual check. The German merchant Africana (5868 GRT) reported being missed.
23 Jun 1943 S-51 attacked a German convoy of the Tanafjord, four torpedoes were fired but none found a target.
27 Jun 1943 S-51 attacked a German convoy of the Tanafjord, four torpedoes were fired but once again none found a target.
3 Sep 1943 S-51 torpedoed and sank the German auxiliary submarine chaser UJ 1202/Franz Dankworth (464 GRT) off the Kongsfjord in position 70°48'N, 29°35'E.
5 Sep 1943 S-51 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 2000 tons off the Kongsfjord. Both torpedoes missed their target.
8 Sep 1943 S-51 attacked a German convoy of the Kongsfjord, four torpedoes were fired but none found a target. The torpedoes were fired from 19 meters down without a visual check.
10 Oct 1944 S-51 attacked a German convoy off the Porsangerfjord. All four torpedoes fired in this attack missed their targets
